mapper.sql: id, model_code, model_name, provider, base_url, api_key_secret_ref, model_identifier, temperature, max_tokens, timeout_seconds, retry_count, json_schema_required, default_model, status, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from llm_model_config where status = 'ENABLED' order by default_model desc, updated_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into llm_model_config ( id, model_code, model_name, provider, base_url, api_key_secret_ref, model_identifier, temperature, max_tokens, timeout_seconds, retry_count, json_schema_required, default_model, status, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{id}, #{modelCode}, #{modelName}, #{provider}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKeySecretRef}, #{modelIdentifier}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{retryCount}, #{jsonSchemaRequired}, #{defaultModel}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update llm_model_config set model_code = #{modelCode}, model_name = #{modelName}, provider = #{provider}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, api_key_secret_ref = #{apiKeySecretRef}, model_identifier = #{modelIdentifier}, temperature = #{temperature}, max_tokens = #{maxTokens}, timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, json_schema_required = #{jsonSchemaRequired}, default_model = #{defaultModel}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
update llm_model_config set status = #{status}, default_model = case when #{status} = 'DISABLED' then '0' else default_model end, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update llm_model_config set default_model = '0', updated_at = current_timestamp
update llm_model_config set default_model = '1', status = 'ENABLED', updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
